files.note: Enriched /remote/comfy/status with throttled getPod podStatus fallback (MPI-96).
_pollEngineReady detects EXITED/TERMINATED/DEAD past grace; manual Connect bails + deletes dead Pod (MPI-96).
Boot auto-connect path (_pollRemoteReady/_initRemoteBoot) bails on dead host + deletes Pod — same bug as Settings, found mid-test (MPI-96).
